channel.title: scripts on ynblog
channel.description: Recent content in scripts on ynblog

item.title: 基于时间创建文件
item.description:
• shell环境基于时间创建文件

#+begin_src : #!/usr/bin/bash

var1=date | tr '年' ' ' | tr '月' ' ' | tr '日' ' ' | awk '{print $1}' var2=date | tr '年' ' ' | tr '月' ' ' | tr '日' ' ' | awk '{print $2}' var3=date | tr '年' ' ' | tr '月' ' ' | tr '日' ' ' | awk '{print $3}'

touch $var1$var2$var3.txt

echo “$var1$var2$var3: yenao” > $var1$var2$var3.txt echo “1. " » $var1$var2$var3.txt #+end_src

  • windows环境基于时间创建文件

#+begin_src : set var1=%date:~0,4% set var2=%date:~5,2% set var3=%date:~8,2%

if not exist %var1%%var2%%var3%.txt ( type nul > %var1%%var2%%var3%.txt echo %var1%%var2%%var3%: yenao > %var1%%var2%%var3%.txt echo 1. » %var1%%var2%%var3%.txt ) #+end_src
